title: Peppery Juicy Light Portuguese Chicken Stir-fry
description: This dish is a high-protein-friendly meal featuring peppery and juicy chicken stir-fried with red wine vinegar, garlic, and bell peppers.
instructions: Marinate the chicken in a bowl with soy sauce, red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper flakes for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over high heat. Add olive oil, swirl to coat the bottom of the pan evenly.
Remove the marinated chicken from the bowl and set aside. In the same pan, add bell peppers and garlic, stir-fry until slightly softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the marinated chicken back into the pan, reduce heat to medium-high, and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until fully cooked through but still juicy.
Stir in red wine vinegar with sugar and pepper flakes, cooking until reduced by half. Remove from heat immediately to prevent further burning.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
